label: Tehran
sub: Khamenei compound, Thar-Allah HQ, Rev. Court, IRIB, Armed Forces GS, Interior Ministry

label: Natanz
sub: Nuclear enrichment facility — ground-penetrating munitions

label: Fordow
sub: Underground nuclear facility — access roads and entrance hit

label: Isfahan
sub: Nuclear material buildings damaged; tunnel entrances impacted

label: Minab
sub: School airstrike — 148–180 children killed. 200ft from IRGC base.

label: Bandar Abbas
sub: Naval base — Jamaran-class corvette sunk (CENTCOM confirmed)

label: Bushehr region
sub: IRGC tanker seizure operations. Port targeted.

label: Tabriz
sub: Military infrastructure strikes reported. NW Iran.

label: Shiraz
sub: Air base and military facilities targeted

label: Dubai
sub: 137 missiles + 209 drones at UAE. Burj Al Arab fire, Jebel Ali Port fire. 3 killed, 58 injured.

label: Abu Dhabi
sub: Zayed Intl Airport hit — 1 killed, 7 injured. Etihad Towers area struck.

label: Doha
sub: 65 missiles + 12 drones. Al Udeid AB targeted. Qatar shot down 2 Su-24s. 16 injured.

label: Bahrain
sub: 5th Fleet HQ targeted. Shahed drone hit apartment. Airport struck. 4 injured.

label: Kuwait
sub: Camp Buehring drone strike — 4 US troops killed. Ali Al Salem AB attacked.

label: Erbil, Iraq
sub: 70+ missiles/drones. Airport + US Consulate targeted. Fire at air base.

label: Israel
sub: Multiple barrages. 9 killed Beit Shemesh, 777 hospitalized. Ben Gurion closed.

label: Ras Tanura
sub: Saudi refinery hit (fire contained). Prince Sultan AB targeted (intercepted).

label: Beirut
sub: Israel struck Dahiyeh suburb. Hezbollah intel chief Makled killed. 52 killed, 154 wounded in Lebanon.

label: Haifa area
sub: Hezbollah fired 6 projectiles at Mishmar HaCarmel — first attack since Nov 2024 ceasefire.

label: USS Abraham Lincoln
sub: CVN-72 + CSG. F/A-18s, F-35Cs. IRGC claims hit — CENTCOM denies.

label: USS Gerald R. Ford
sub: CVN-78 + CSG-12. Eastern Mediterranean off Israel.

label: Al Udeid AB, Qatar
sub: Major US air ops hub. Targeted by Iranian retaliation.

label: Al Dhafra AB, UAE
sub: US air operations base.

label: Camp Buehring, Kuwait
sub: 3rd ESC. 4 US troops killed here by Arash-2 drone.

label: RAF Akrotiri, Cyprus
sub: UK base. Suspected drone hit, no casualties.

label: Strait of Hormuz
sub: De facto shutdown. IRGC says traffic "not allowed." 150+ ships anchored. 15M bbl/day normally transits.
